case_title: ROSENBLUM PARISH AND BACIGALUP PROFESSIONAL CORP VS MILLER NEVIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,114.05 FILED BY ROSENBLUM PARISH AND BACIGALUP PROFESSIONAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER NEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-02-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
